# freememegen.app

> Free online meme generator. Choose from templates or upload your own image, add text, and download — no watermark, no signup, runs in your browser.

## What it does
freememegen.app is a free, browser-based meme generator. Create memes with popular templates or your own images, add customizable text with classic meme styling, and download in full quality with no watermarks. All processing happens locally — no images are uploaded to any server.

## Key facts
- 100% free, no sign-up required
- No watermarks on any downloads
- Works offline (PWA)
- Privacy-first: zero tracking, no cookies, no analytics
- Works on desktop, tablet, and mobile
- Part of the Freesuite collection (freesuite.app)

## Features
- 20+ built-in meme templates
- Upload your own image (drag & drop)
- Classic Impact font with white text and black outline
- Customizable font, color, outline, size, alignment
- Multiple text boxes positioned anywhere
- Drag text to reposition on canvas
- Download as PNG or JPEG
- Copy to clipboard
- Dark mode support
- Touch-friendly for mobile

## Comparisons
- vs Imgflip: freememegen.app is free with no watermarks or ads. Imgflip adds a watermark on the free tier.
- vs Kapwing: freememegen.app runs entirely in-browser with no account needed. Kapwing requires sign-up and watermarks free exports.

## Related tools
- freecropimage.app — Image Cropper
- freeimagecompressor.app — Image Compressor
- freeimagetopdf.app — Image to PDF
- freeqrcodegen.app — QR Code Generator
